productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Black Tshirt
description: Composition Black round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short raglan sleeves, ribbed neckline and cuffs, a yoke and pleats at the back and brand badge on the left hem Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron on decorations Designed for the woman of style, this black t-shirt from united colors of benetton is an absolutely fabulous fashionable addition to any woman's wardrobe. The pleats add to your femininity while the soft cotton keeps you fresh all day. Team this with jeans and sandals. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5.8&rdquo and chest 33"
